title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode is a popular open-source AI coding agent with terminal and desktop workflows, built-in planning and build modes, broad package-manager support, and active releases. It appeared as one of the most prominent AI-related repositories in the day’s GitHub collection.
friendlySummary: OpenCode is a popular open-source coding agent that runs in the terminal and also has a desktop app. It supports different modes for planning and building.
whyItMatters: Developers can use it as a transparent coding-agent alternative, inspect how agent workflows are implemented, or adapt its planning/build-agent pattern for their own internal tools.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It is useful for developers who want a coding agent they can inspect, run locally, and adapt. Teams can also study how its agent workflow is designed.
